purpose: Freeze the oracle sources used for pySTAMPS parity decisions.

manual_references.notes: Workflow overview and supported processing modes.
Pinned user/manual reference for the vendored StaMPS checkout.
Tracked manual source used to audit wording and section references.

cpp_wrapper.notes: StaMPS ships the C/C++ helper programs in the same upstream repository as the MATLAB sources; the pinned repository URL and revision above are the wrapper oracle reference for this repo.

precedence_rule.rule: When the pinned StaMPS C/C++ helper behavior intentionally differs from the pinned MATLAB scripts, treat the pinned C/C++ helper path as the practical parity oracle and record that choice in the parity evidence.

negative_completion_rule: If cpp_wrapper.repository_url or cpp_wrapper.pinned_revision is empty, this manifest is invalid and downstream stories must not claim oracle-backed completion.
